summary: Iteration 25 — Tested Users page rename + dual panels + Modules modal, Make Ex-Licensee label, and manual order creation with billing address. All 7 backend tests passed and all critical UI scenarios verified. Found and FIXED one bug: franchisee detail page crashed for franchisees whose 'tags' field is stored as a string (Brisbane / Worldwide Licencee), which also blocked the 'Make Ex-Licensee' label from rendering.

ui_bugs.issue: Page threw TypeError 'f.tags.some is not a function' for any franchisee whose tags field is stored as a string (not array) in Mongo. Brisbane (id 9b4992aa-89b2-4f0b-aa5d-b1fa95833068, Worldwide Licencee) reproduces it. Side-effect: the 'Make Ex-Licensee' label never rendered because the JSX block crashed before reaching the button. FIXED by reusing the already-normalised `tags` array variable (defined at line 475) instead of the raw `f.tags`.

action_items: Review the small frontend fix applied at /app/frontend/src/pages/FranchiseeDetailPage.js (lines 497-498) — replaced raw f.tags with the safer normalised `tags` array variable.
Optional cleanup: backend could normalise franchisee.tags to always be an array at write/read time, to prevent similar bugs elsewhere (e.g., FranchiseesListPage filtering, search by tag).
critical_code_review_comments: Franchisee tags are inconsistently stored as either string or array in Mongo. The /api/franchisees response also returns the raw value. Consider normalising at the API boundary (Pydantic validator or response shaping) to avoid every consumer having to defensively coerce.

CreateOrderModal Customer Name uses XeroContactPicker without a data-testid on its internal input; tests had to fall back to the wrapper testid + querying the inner input. Adding `data-testid='create-order-customer-name'` on the inner input would improve testability.

POST /api/orders accepts arbitrary fields and creates a draft even when product line items are absent — fine for UX but the resulting draft #9178 shown in screenshot has no line items and £0.00 total; consider client-side validation requiring at least one line item before submit.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required testids and behaviours verified after fix)

seed_data_creation: Created 5 draft orders during UI testing — all cleaned up via DELETE /api/orders/{id}. No franchisee tags were added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Worldwide Licencee franchisee for UI testing: id=9b4992aa-89b2-4f0b-aa5d-b1fa95833068 (Alison King / Creative Mojo Brisbane). Its `tags` field is stored as the string 'Worldwide Licencee' (NOT an array) — be careful if writing any code that calls Array methods on franchisee.tags. Demo franchisee detail page works fine (tags array). The CreateOrderModal customer-name input lives inside XeroContactPicker (wrapper testid `create-order-customer-picker`). All 8 billing-address inputs use the testids documented in the request and are working.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA — Make Ex-Licensee label not appearing: FranchiseeDetailPage.js line 498 read `(f.tags || []).some(...)`. For Alison King (Worldwide Licencee), Mongo stored tags as a scalar string 'Worldwide Licencee', so `(f.tags || [])` evaluated to that string and `.some` is undefined for strings. The exception was caught by React's error boundary and rendered a blank/partial detail page — including suppressing the deactivate button. Fix: reuse the `tags` array (already normalised on line 475: `Array.isArray(f.tags) ? f.tags : f.tags ? [f.tags] : []`) for both the isEx and isLicensee checks. Verified: Brisbane page now shows 'Make Ex-Licensee'; demo franchisee shows 'Make Ex-Franchisee'.
